{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231946518E57DDB2864CEB51A4A4"}"},"total":15},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612517518755808024","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这设定不错，看着好爽。[怒]（能弥补上本书的遗憾就更好了）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772431049,"group_id":"7610513164672715801","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N//FvuCtuzyOOaOZzbwfRtRUN0yQ61c93KnnXjei8nRC","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/032db431247048c08605ff163901ba5c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793745&x-signature=fgBJ7Bu1sgC0ZOXYR1O7oSyZJmo%3D","user_id":"2911109516640136","user_name":"咻花生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2911109516640136","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7610513164672715801","book_info":{"abstract":"诸葛亮在五丈原快不行了，哭着说“悠悠苍天何薄于我”。
我一道白光把他捞进ICU。
“丞相，病好了就回去吧，蜀汉还等你北伐呢。”
诸葛亮看着手机上的历史书，沉默了。
“路公子，你这个世界……来都来了，我能不能先不回去？”
……
路东，一个拥有“亿点点”超能力的普通人。
他的能力很简单：想去哪儿就去哪儿，不限时间，不限地点。
那些让历史粉夜不能寐的意难平，路东亲自去改写！
